visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long brown hair, wearing a grey t-shirt, is seated at a white table. In front of her are several bags of Taiwanese snacks. She gestures excitedly toward the camera. (2) She picks up a large clear plastic bag containing red, flattened snacks. She removes a rectangular piece and takes a bite, looking thoughtful and surprised. (3) The scene cuts to her holding a green Lay's tube. She opens it, smells the aroma, and samples a thin chip, showing a slightly confused facial expression. (4) She presents a pink and white snack bag featuring a cartoon character. She eats a small, puffy snack and nods enthusiastically, pointing at the packaging. (5) She holds a yellow Lay's bag. She takes a deep breath to smell the chips before tasting one. Her eyes widen in realization. (6) She holds a black and yellow Lay's bag. She eats a chip and tilts her head while processing the flavor. (7) She unwraps a large, round, dark brown cake wrapped in plastic. She takes a large bite and holds a Hello Kitty plush toy in her lap. (8) She shows a red bag with a corn cob illustration. She eats a snack piece and displays a very satisfied and moved facial expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 第一次吃台灣才有的餅乾. [Subtitle]: Trying Snacks You Can Only Find in Taiwan. [Logo]: 🇹🇼. (2) [Subtitle]: 大豬公. [Variety]: (從來沒吃過的一位). (3) [Subtitle]: 為了第一次看影片的人說明. [Subtitle]: 這位是韓國人🇰🇷. [Variety]: 恩... 不懂. (4) [Subtitle]: 想到韓國有類似的 쫀득기. [Subtitle]: 這位其實滿期待. [Subtitle]: 但我們先吃這個. (5) [Subtitle]: 香菜. [Variety]: 您們知道我本來不吃香菜嗎?. [Variety]: (不知道...). (6) [Subtitle]: 我真的不喜歡香菜. [Subtitle]: 乖乖. [Subtitle]: 很多人說乖乖有香辣口味. (7) [Subtitle]: 大家都推薦給我吃. [Subtitle]: 現在才吃的乖女人. [Variety]: 爽脆!!!!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 有一點像咖哩味道?. [Subtitle]: 波的多. [Subtitle]: 鳳梨酥口味?!. (9) [Subtitle]: 真的事鳳梨酥香味. [Variety]: 馬西搜!!. [Variety]: ???. (10) [Subtitle]: 有鳳梨酥味道. [Subtitle]: 後面帶到鳳梨特有的酸甜味道!. [Subtitle]: 還有皮蛋口味. (11) [Subtitle]: 有!!. [Subtitle]: 我本來愛吃皮蛋嘻嘻. [Subtitle]: 意外皮蛋的味道沒那麼重喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 吃過的人底下留言. [Variety]: 口感好紮實. [Variety]: (厚..甲). (13) [Subtitle]: 比想像中還綿密!. [Subtitle]: 跟這個差不多的大. (14) [Subtitle]: 本身很好吃. [Subtitle]: 想像中是真的不好吃的說. (15) [Subtitle]: 烤玉米口味. [Variety]: (感動不已).

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long brown hair and a grey t-shirt, appearing as a food reviewer or vlogger.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a white wall and a desk. Various snack packages and a Hello Kitty plush are visible on the desk.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop BGM begins with a driving percussive beat. A female voice speaks with high arousal and a cheerful tone, introducing the video. (2) A sharp plastic rustling sound triggers as a snack bag is picked up. The female speaker continues her commentary with frequent pitch variations. (3) A loud, crisp crunching sound is heard as the speaker bites into a snack. Her voice reflects a sudden reaction of surprise. (4) Continuous upbeat music plays underneath a series of rustling sounds as packaging is handled. The speaker's delivery remains energetic and fast. (5) Another distinct crunching sound occurs. The speaker's tone shifts to expressive curiosity and then delight. (6) Fast-paced cuts in the audio track sync with new snack bags being rustled. The BGM remains constant in tempo and energy. (7) Loud chewing and swallowing sounds are clearly audible in the mix. The speaker provides positive emotional feedback in a bright vocal tone. (8) Final rustling of plastic followed by an enthusiastic, concluding vocal phrase over the fading percussive music bed.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Series of snack reviews -> Concluding reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and react to unique Taiwanese snacks for an audience, providing a cross-cultural perspective from a Korean speaker living in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While multiple brands are featured, it appears to be a personal food review vlog rather than a paid endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features high-density subtitles and expressive editing, characteristic of short-form social media content. The audio focus on crunching sounds enhances the sensory appeal.
